name: Cooler Master NR200P V3 Mini-ITX PC Case - Top-Mount 280mm Radiator Support, Vertical GPU Mount with Mesh Side Panel & Removable Backplate, PCIe 5.0 Riser Cable Included, Fits 130mm SFX PSUs
